jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Pantaloons
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pantaloons! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pantaloons:
Pantaloons is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pantaloons!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
